content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 27, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 27 focused on enhancing agent connectivity, refining message handling, and improving system stability. Key updates include new GitHub integration for coding agents, improved automation credential management, and several bug fixes addressing build warnings and message race conditions.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Agent Connectivity & Automation**
*   Added a GitHub connection card to the local UI settings, allowing users to persist Personal Access Tokens (PATs) for coding sub-agents ([#7139](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7139)).
*   Implemented a missing-credentials banner in the AutomationsView to provide clear user feedback when n8n workflows lack necessary credentials ([#7134](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7134)).
*   Demoted n8n binary-missing diagnostic logs to debug level to reduce noise in the dev-server logs ([#7138](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7138)).

**Message Handling & Logic Fixes**
*   Updated message processing to preserve explicit REPLY responses even when a race-discard condition is triggered by newer incoming messages ([#7143](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7143)).
*   Ensured the action-routing pipeline correctly respects the explicit REPLY action during metadata recovery ([#7141](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7141)).

**System Maintenance & Stability**
*   Resolved re-export cycles and static node import issues to clear build warnings ([#7133](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7133)).
*   Updated the `supabase/postgres` Docker dependency to version `17.6.1.112` ([#7142](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7142)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#7144](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7144): fix(apps): render internal-tool hero images in AppsView.
*   [#7135](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7135): Shaw/checkpoint 20260426 eliza.

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Integration & Testing**
*   [#7108](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7108): Successfully integrated the `shaw/checkpoint-20260426-eliza` branch into `develop`.
*   [#7136](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7136), [#7137](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7137): Verified GitHub authentication wiring for the botdick agent via both manual issue creation and the automated message/action pipeline.
*   [#7140](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7140): Confirmed successful Discord path functionality.

## NEW ISSUES

**GitHub Auth Verification**
*   [#7136](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7136), [#7137](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7137): Issues created to test and validate GitHub authentication for the botdick agent.

**Discord Integration**
*   [#7140](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7140): Issue created to confirm the Discord message path is operational.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   [#79](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/79) (Dependency Dashboard): The latest update from `lalalune` indicates that 6 pending Renovate updates have been triggered, including major version bumps for Node.js (24), TypeScript (6), and rimraf (6). The team is awaiting the next CI run to determine if these major updates require additional refactoring.
